parsed.production_notes: The character explicitly introduces herself as an AI tutor. The visuals exhibit typical AI-generated traits: overly smooth skin, slightly unnatural lip-sync, and a static, perfectly lit composition with minimal body movement.

characters.appearance: Young woman with fair skin, light freckles, and long red hair tied back. She has green eyes and a smooth, flawless complexion.
characters.wardrobe: Grey tank top and small gold hoop earrings.

scenes.setting: A bedroom, lying on a white bed with soft, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of a young woman with red hair lying on a white bed. She rests her head on her left hand, with her arm bent. She wears a grey tank top and small gold hoop earrings. The background is slightly blurred, showing soft, warm lighting, possibly from a bedside lamp. She looks directly at the camera with a friendly expression.

scenes.visual_description: A single, continuous close-up shot of an AI-generated woman lying on a bed. She speaks directly to the camera throughout the video. Dynamic, word-by-word captions appear in the lower center of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Every day you don't practice speaking English is a day you stay exactly where you are.
Character A says: I'm Loora, your AI English tutor, and I'm here to make sure that doesn't happen.
Character A says: With me, you get real conversations anytime, anywhere.
Character A says: No scheduling, no awkwardness. Just you and me talking.
Character A says: I give you instant feedback on your mistakes. Not after the conversation, during it.
Character A says: So your brain connects the correction to the moment, and you actually remember it next time.
Character A says: Five minutes a day is enough to start feeling the difference.
Character A says: Ten minutes and you'll wonder why you waited this long.
Character A says: Let's practice together right now.
scenes.on_screen_text: everyday you don't practice speaking English is a day you stay exactly where you are I'm Loora your AI English tutor and I'm here to make sure that doesn't happen with me you get real conversations anytime anywhere no scheduling no awkwardness just you and me talking I give you instant feedback on your mistakes not after the conversation during it so your brain connects the correction to the moment and you actually remember it next time five minutes a day is enough to start feeling the difference 10 minutes and you'll wonder why you waited this long let's practice together right now
